subcodes.first_line: May my spirit be a sacrifice for you, O beloved of God! As the veils of the elemental world and the dark curtain of this earthly realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لکم الفدا یا احباء الله چون حجبات عالم عنصرى و پرده تیره جهان خاکى از
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @high station of the true believer
